dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 7222 IH: No Tax on Boat Loan Interest Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Ms. Mace introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Ways and Means

form.official-title: To amend the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 to include watercraft as applicable passenger vehicles for purpose of deducting personal loan interest.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the No Tax on Boat Loan Interest Act of 2026.

subsection.text: Section 163(h)(4)(D) of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 is amended to read as follows:

clause.text: For purposes of this paragraph, the term applicable passenger vehicle means an applicable motor vehicle or an applicable watercraft.
For purposes of this subparagraph. the term applicable motor vehicle means any vehicle—

subclause.text: the original use of which commences with the taxpayer,
which is manufactured primarily for use on public streets, roads, and highways (not including a vehicle operated exclusively on a rail or rails),
which is a car, minivan, van, sport utility vehicle, pickup truck, or motorcycle,
which is treated as a motor vehicle for purposes of title II of the Clean Air Act, and
which has a gross vehicle weight rating of less than 14,000 pounds.

clause.continuation-text: Such term shall not include any vehicle the final assembly of which did not occur within the United States.

clause.text: For purposes of this subparagraph, the term applicable watercraft means a watercraft—

subclause.text: the original use of which commences with the taxpayer,
which is a recreational vessel (as defined in section 2101 of title 46, United States Code), and
which is a motorboat, as such term is defined in section 90.10–23 of title 46, Code of Federal Regulations (as in effect on the date of the enactment of this subparagraph).

clause.continuation-text: Such term shall not include any vessel the final assembly of which did not occur in the United States.

subsection.text: Section 163(h)(4)(iii) of such Code is amended by striking the vehicle and all that follows through the end of the sentence and inserting on the return of tax for the taxable year the vehicle identification number (in the case of an applicable motor vehicle) or the hull identification number (in the case of an applicable watercraft)..
Section 6050AA(b)(2)(E) of such Code is amended by inserting or hull after vehicle.
The amendments made by this section shall apply to indebtedness incurred after December 31, 2024.
